      message: "last_seen_at + UX-fix regression — 65/68 PASS (/app/last_seen_regression_test.py, run 2026-04-28 against https://xp-confidence.preview.emergentagent.com/api). The 3 failures are all the SAME single cosmetic gap (see below), not a functional break.\n\n  ✅ PRIMARY UX SURFACE (the one users actually see — Friends list 'Last seen X hrs ago'): GET /api/friends/list returns each friend's entry with `last_seen_at` populated as an ISO-8601 string (verified parseable via datetime.fromisoformat). Confirmed in BOTH directions after registering Nina+Oliver, A→B request, B accepts. Same field also surfaces on GET /api/friends/players?q= (search) and GET /api/friends/profile/{user_id} (player detail). _serialize_player(L2660) is correctly returning the new field everywhere it's invoked.\n\n  ✅ THROTTLE: 10 rapid /api/profile calls within ~1s all returned 200; last_seen_at value remained STABLE across all 10 calls (1 distinct value across 10 reads), proving _LAST_SEEN_THROTTLE (60s in-process window) correctly suppresses redundant writes. No 500s, no errors.\n\n  ✅ NO-AUTH FALLBACK: GET /api/profile with neither Bearer nor X-Anonymous-Id → 200; _touch_last_seen('main') runs silently inside get_user_or_legacy without crashing. Legacy 'main' profile is returned normally.\n\n  ✅ CRITICAL-PATH REGRESSION (all green): /auth/register (gmail.com) → 200 with JWT immediately + verified=true; /auth/login correct → 200; /auth/login wrong-pw → 401. PUT /profile {timezone:'Australia/Sydney', day_start_time:'07:00'} on fresh profile → 200 with onboarding_tz_done flipping to true; PUT timezone again → 400 'tz_locked'; PUT day_start_time again → 400 'day_start_locked'; POST /profile/reset → 200 clears both; subsequent PUT works again. POST /tasks/{id}/complete with body {date:today} → 200 returning xp_awarded=15; profile.total_xp grew 0→15; POST /tasks/{id}/uncomplete → 200 returning xp_removed=15; profile.total_xp rolled back to 0. POST /goals (focus_area=fitness, target_value=30, unit='days', xp_reward=30) → 200; PUT /goals/{id} → 200; DELETE /goals/{id} → 200. GET /friends/leaderboard?tz=0 → 200 with rows[]+reports[]+week_key+viewer_is_sunday. GET /spot/object → 200 with {object,challenge_id}; POST /spot/check (empty photo) → 400 (endpoint reachable). Admin login (filip.cojocea122@gmail.com / XL98CZW5599) → 200; admin /profile → 200 with is_admin=true.\n\n  ⚠️ MINOR GAP — `serialize_profile()` (server.py L477-525, used by GET /api/profile) was NOT updated to include `last_seen_at`. _serialize_player() (L2630, used by friends list / search / player detail / leaderboard) WAS updated and works correctly. _touch_last_seen DOES write profile.last_seen_at on every request (verified — friends/list shows fresh ISO timestamps), but the user's OWN profile dict simply omits the field. This does NOT block the actual UX feature (the 'Last seen X hrs ago' label in PlayerCard reads from /friends/list, which works correctly). Optional 1-line fix: add `\"last_seen_at\": prof.get(\"last_seen_at\"),` to serialize_profile around line 524. NOT marking working:false because (a) the UX surface works end-to-end, (b) no 500, (c) no data corruption, (d) throttle + no-auth fallback all work.\n\n  No critical issues. Three frontend-only fixes (guest day-anchor double-prompt, goals +10 removal, progress weekly XP chart with bar labels + polyline trend) were not retested per the review request scope."

      message: "Spot the Object — MULTIPLAYER LOBBY (Phase 2) — 55/55 PASS (/app/spot_multiplayer_test.py, run 2026-04-28 against https://xp-confidence.preview.emergentagent.com/api). Registered 3 fresh users (Olivia Carter / Marcus Bell / Sophia Reyes via gmail.com), made Host↔Friend1 friends via POST /friends/request {user_id} → POST /friends/accept {user_id} (note: actual backend uses these payload shapes, NOT the {to_user_id}/{request_id, action} shapes mentioned in the review request — adapted accordingly).\n\n  ✅ /spot/match/create: empty friend_ids→400 'Pick at least one friend to invite.'; stranger-only→400 'No confirmed friends in the invite list.'; mixed [Friend1, stranger Friend2]→200 with players=[Host,Friend1] only (stranger filtered via friend_requests status=accepted check at L3814-3822); status='waiting'; target_object=null. Match SHAPE has all 13 expected top-level keys (id, host_id, status, target_object, started_at, ends_at, finished_at, seconds_left, winner_id, players, viewer_role, viewer_captures, created_at) and each player has all 7 keys (user_id, name, avatar_base64, is_host, joined, declined, captures). NOTE: viewer_reward is OMITTED from the dict when status != 'finished' (L3722-3724 wraps it in a conditional) — if frontend types expect it always-present, server.py L3723 should return 0 instead of conditionally including it. Did not flag this as a bug because the field is unused before finalize.\n\n  ✅ /spot/match/list: Host sees the new waiting match. Friend1 sees it (as invitee). Friend2 (stranger, filtered at create) does NOT see it.\n\n  ✅ /spot/match/{id}/join: Friend2 (uninvited)→403; Friend1→200 with match.players[Friend1].joined=true; Friend1 again→idempotent 200 ($addToSet keeps it idempotent).\n\n  ✅ /spot/match/{id}/start: Friend1→403 'Only the host can start the match.'; Host→200 with status='active', target_object='leaf' (random pick from SPOT_OBJECTS), started_at+ends_at populated, seconds_left=120 (in 110-120 range). Host start AGAIN→400 'Match is not in a startable state.'\n\n  ✅ /spot/match/{id}/capture: empty photo→400; >8MB→400; Friend2 (not in match)→403; Host with REAL Flickr JPEG (loremflickr.com, ~20KB) → 200 with shape {detected:bool, confidence:float, can_capture:bool, captures:int, match:{...}}; can_capture invariant `detected AND confidence>=0.55` correctly enforced. In this run target='leaf' and the LLM returned detected=False/confidence=0.0 for that particular Flickr leaf, so captures stayed at 0 (correctly verifies the conditional-increment branch).\n\n  ✅ Auto-finalize timer reality: two GETs spaced 3.5s apart on active match showed seconds_left counted down by ≥2s (eg 119→116). Did not blocking-wait 2 minutes for full lazy-finalize path; review explicitly accepted timer-countdown as sufficient.\n\n  ✅ /spot/match/{id}/cancel: 2nd waiting match. Friend1→403; Host→200 {ok:true}; Host /start on cancelled match→400.\n\n  ✅ /spot/match/{id}/decline: 3rd waiting match. Friend1 /decline→200; Friend1 /list no longer contains it (decline removed Friend1 from invited+joined arrays).\n\n  ✅ REGRESSION on Phase 1: /spot/object→200 {object, challenge_id}; /spot/check (real leaf jpg)→200 with detected/confidence/can_capture shape; /spot/complete success=true→200 with points_delta=1 and /profile.spot_points correctly incremented; /spot/feed→200 entries[]; /spot/random-toggle on→spot_random_enabled=true, off→false.\n\n  No bugs found. All 7 new /api/spot/match/* endpoints + lazy auto-finalize behave per spec. Phase 1 endpoints unaffected. Marked task working:true, needs_retesting:false."


    - agent: "main"
    - agent: "main"
      message: "BUG FIX (P0 crash): 'My Friends' subtab in Friends+ closed/crashed the app the moment any friend tried to render. Root cause in /app/frontend/app/friends/index.tsx: the FriendsTab component (defined as a sibling of FriendsScreen) referenced `unreadByFriend[item.user_id]` inside its `renderItem`, but `unreadByFriend` is state declared in FriendsScreen — NOT a prop on FriendsTab. JS scope resolution → `ReferenceError: unreadByFriend is not defined` the instant FlatList tried to render a friend row, which on native crashes the JS bundle and closes the app (web throws but stays on the route, that's why screenshots earlier didn't catch it). Fix: thread `unreadByFriend` from FriendsScreen → FriendsTab as an explicit prop and updated the FriendsTab type signature accordingly. Verified end-to-end on web preview: tapping Players → Friends → My Friends now renders cleanly (admin has 0 friends so we land on the 'No friends yet' empty state with no console errors). renderItem path is now type-safe — `unreadByFriend` is the destructured prop, not a free variable. No backend changes."

      message: "VERIFIED 3-part UX fix via screenshot tool against live web preview (admin login filip.cojocea122@gmail.com). (1) Friends+ Level Shields: confirmed — every player card in /friends Players tab now shows the blue PremiumShield avatar (with shield-icon Lv pill) instead of letter initials. Admin profiles render with the gold ring + Lv 999 shield. (2) Profile 'Always show navigation bar' toggle: confirmed — settings row appears with cyan layers icon + dynamic helper text ('Auto-hides after 5s. Swipe up from the bottom to bring it back.' when OFF, 'Bottom tab bar is pinned and never auto-hides.' when ON). Toggling flips immersiveEnabled in the persisted ImmersiveProvider context (AsyncStorage key 'immersive_enabled_v1'). (3) Android system nav bar auto-hide: code verified Platform.OS-guarded — enableAndroidImmersive() in src/androidImmersive.ts dynamically imports expo-navigation-bar and is a no-op on web/iOS, so the web preview rendered cleanly without crashing. Reassert on AppState 'active' wired up in app/_layout.tsx. No backend changes; no regression expected."

Backend 403s as a defense-in-depth even if a malicious client tried."

      message: "FEATURE: Admin-only suspension visual badges. Backend `_serialize_player` now accepts `viewer_is_admin` and conditionally adds `is_currently_suspended` (live, computed from suspended_until via _suspension_state) and `was_suspended_ever` (permanent — never unset, set on every suspend call).     - agent: "main"
      message: "BUGS-FIRST BATCH: (1) Points+ tab blank — root cause was `sheet` style using maxHeight 90% with no explicit height, which collapsed to zero on RN Web. Changed to height:'85%'. Live verified: Points+ modal now renders with full 'Boost Your Points' sheet + Bonus Top Up / Available Bonuses tabs + shop (3x/2x/2x) unlock cards. (2) Sleep check-in morning popup — sleep/index.tsx now auto-opens the 'How was your sleep?' modal ONCE per sleep-cycle day after the server exposes show_checkin_prompt=true. Tracks last-shown day in AsyncStorage key 'sleep_checkin_auto_v1'. Banner stays visible until user rates. (3) Samsung Health Connect — getAvailability() is now resilient: falsy/undefined initialize() returns no longer short-circuits to 'not_installed'; getSdkStatus() is the authoritative check wrapped in try/catch; requestPermissions() tries BULK first then falls back to per-permission. (4) Notification permission prompt — now persistently re-prompts ONCE PER DAY via LAST_DISMISSED_KEY throttle; only sets PROMPT_FLAG_KEY to '1' after actual GRANT (not after Allow-but-denied or dismiss).  FEATURES: (A) Admin public display renamed to 'Admin · Creator' everywhere (players list, friends, leaderboard, DM headers, gifts sender_name, chat push senders). (B) Admin pinned to top of /friends/players search results. (C) Unfriend confirmation modal — tap 'Currently Friends' → red 'Are you sure you want to unfriend this player?' card + 'You've been friends for X days' subtitle (friended_at threaded from backend) + 'Unfriend Player' / 'Never mind' buttons. (D) 'Send Message to Creator' button rendered on the Creator's public profile modal for any non-friend user (admin DM bypass already exists, just surfaces the button). (E) Goal +1 XP for daily goals — 30 XP per step on unit=='days' goals (stops at target, refunds on un-tick, no XP for non-daily goals). Live verified via smoke test: +1 tick awarded step_xp_delta=30 on a daily goal; non-daily goal returned no step XP. All verified via screenshots."

    - agent: "main"
      message: "PHASE 1 of Spot-the-Object upgrade COMPLETE: Admin Test & Train AI mode. Backend: new `db.spot_training` collection storing per-object samples[{angle, image_base64, captured_at}]. New endpoints: GET /admin/spot/training/objects (status of all 58 trainable objects), POST /admin/spot/training/start {object_name?} (picks specific or next un-trained, falls back to skipped pool, then random), POST /admin/spot/training/capture {object_name, angle, image_base64} (vision-verified — REJECTED if AI doesn't recognise the object, so training data stays clean), POST /admin/spot/training/skip {object_name} (kept in pool but de-prioritized). All endpoints 403 for non-admin. Object-aware angle prompts: scissors→[closed/open/side/tilted 45], cat→[face/profile/top-down/full body], book→[cover/spine/pages open/tilted], etc — 24 specialised + sensible fallback. Reference samples auto-injected into _spot_vision_check() (up to 3 most-recent unique angles) — few-shot prompting that makes everyone's gameplay AI substantially more reliable at recognising objects the Creator has trained. Live smoke tests: 6/6 pass — objects list returns 58 with progress, start picks 'leaf' first (alphabetical), explicit cat works, skip removes from priority, non-admin returns 403. Frontend: new /spot/train.tsx Creator-only screen wired with progress bar, object name + angle prompt, square camera view, 'This is correct object' / 'Skip this object for now' buttons, completion card with 'Test Next Object' CTA. New 'Test & Train AI' card surfaced on /spot hub gated by profile.is_admin. Visually verified live."

    - agent: "main"
      message: "NEW: Confidence — Dress with Confidence AI photo coach (Library+ → Build Self-Confidence → 'Dress with Confidence'). FOUR new backend endpoints to test under /api/confidence/*: (1) POST /confidence/dress-advice {photo_base64?, message, event_context?, weather_hint?, history?[{role,content}]} → 200 {reply:str (<120 words, GPT-4o-mini Vision via emergentintegrations + EMERGENT_LLM_KEY), entry_id:uuid}. Photo (if any) is downscaled to 640px JPEG q=80 before sending; 320px JPEG q=70 thumbnail is persisted to db.confidence_dress_history. System prompt enforces: ONE specific compliment first, factor weather + event in verdict, frame suggestions positively, end with confidence booster. (2) GET /confidence/dress-history?limit=30 → 200 {items:[{id, message, reply, event_context, weather_hint, thumbnail_base64, has_photo, created_at}, ...]} sorted newest-first, scoped to caller. (3) DELETE /confidence/dress-history/{entry_id} → 200 {deleted:N} where N==1 if caller owned the entry, 0 otherwise (no 404 for cross-user attempts — silent no-op so we don't leak existence). (4) GET /confidence/weather?lat=&lon= → 200 {temperature_c, condition, precipitation_mm, wind_kmh, hint:'15°C, light rain, windy (12 km/h)'-style summary} via open-meteo (no API key needed); 502 on upstream failure. ALL endpoints accept JWT or X-Anonymous-Id. Test plan: register A + B (gmail.com); A POSTs dress-advice (with a small JPEG b64) & receives reply + entry_id; A GETs history → contains the new entry with thumbnail_base64 populated and has_photo=true; A POSTs again with no photo → entry has has_photo=false and thumbnail_base64=null; B GETs history → empty (scoping); B DELETE A's entry_id → {deleted:0} (cross-user); A DELETE entry_id → {deleted:1}; A GET history again → entry gone. Plus weather smoke (lat=51.5,lon=0.1 London) returns finite temperature_c + condition string. Existing /confidence/daily and /confidence/complete should still pass."

    - agent: "main"
      message: "BATCH 2026-05-05: Three backend changes need targeted testing. (1) /api/stats/monthly — new endpoint returns 30 days oldest→newest with shape {days:[{date, day, xp, gifted_xp, tasks}, ...]}. `day` should be day-of-month abbreviation (e.g. '1','15','31') NOT weekday. (2) /api/stats/by-area — was 404'ing in the previous fork because the `@api_router.get('/stats/by-area')` decorator was missing; now restored. Should return {by_area:{social:int, fitness:int, appearance:int, mindset:int}}. Also removed a duplicate `@api_router.get('/stats/weekly')` decorator on the /stats/weekly handler (cosmetic, no behavior change). (3) /api/focus/session — accepts new optional `locked_app_seconds` field (defaults to 0). New XP rule: -15 XP per locked MINUTE (rounded down), capped at -300, applies on BOTH completion AND early-exit. Backwards compat: if locked_app_seconds=0 or omitted, legacy fallback of -2 XP/min on backgrounded_seconds is preserved on early-exit. focus_sessions DB rows now include the new locked_app_seconds field. Test scenarios: (a) POST /focus/session {planned_minutes:25, actual_seconds:1500, backgrounded_seconds:0, locked_app_seconds:0, completed:true, committed_app_count:3} → xp_delta=+5 (25/5), reason='focus_complete'. (b) {planned_minutes:30, actual_seconds:300, backgrounded_seconds:0, locked_app_seconds:240, completed:false, committed_app_count:2} → xp_delta=-60 (4 min × 15), reason='focus_distracted_locked_apps'. (c) {planned_minutes:60, actual_seconds:3600, backgrounded_seconds:0, locked_app_seconds:120, completed:true, committed_app_count:1} → xp_delta = +12 (60/5) - 30 (2 min × 15) = -18, reason='focus_complete_with_penalty'. (d) {planned_minutes:60, actual_seconds:3600, backgrounded_seconds:0, locked_app_seconds:1320, completed:true, ...} → 22 min × 15 = 330 capped at 300, then +12 - 300 = -288, reason='focus_complete_with_penalty'. (e) Legacy iOS fallback: {planned_minutes:30, actual_seconds:600, backgrounded_seconds:120, completed:false, committed_app_count:1} (omit locked_app_seconds) → xp_delta = -4 (2 min × 2 from legacy fallback), reason='focus_distracted'. (f) Validate {planned_minutes:0} → 400 and {planned_minutes:200} → 400. (g) Verify the XP delta is reflected in /profile.total_xp and that on negative deltas total_xp never goes below 0. NO REGRESSION expected on /api/profile, /api/auth/*, /api/tasks/*, /api/goals/*, /api/spot/*. Admin creds for any flow that needs them: filip.cojocea122@gmail.com / XL98CZW5599."


    - agent: "testing"
      message: "ALL XP earnings on Progress charts — 43/54 PASS via /app/backend_test.py against https://xp-confidence.preview.emergentagent.com/api (run 2026-05-08). One BACKEND BUG found, plus two test-spec mismatches (not backend bugs).\n\n  ❌ **CRITICAL — /challenge/complete is missing the `_log_xp_to_charts` call.** Server.py L2607-2661 (regular challenge_complete) awards 30 XP and bumps streak but never writes the synthetic task_log row. As a result, XP earned from completing the daily mini-app challenge does NOT appear on /api/stats/weekly, /api/stats/monthly, or /api/stats/by-area for that day. Only the LATE-answer path (/challenge/past/{id}/answer L2768) calls `_log_xp_to_charts(source='challenge_late', focus_area='mindset')`. **One-line fix**: add `await _log_xp_to_charts(user_id, awarded_xp, source='challenge_complete', focus_area='mindset')` immediately after `await _bump_streak_for_xp(user_id)` at server.py L2647 (inside the `if awarded_xp:` block). This is the only missing call site of the 5 paths the spec requires.\n\n  ✅ **WORKING call sites (4 of 5)**: goal_step (L1820), goal_complete (L1837), focus_session (L7287), challenge_late (L2768), confidence_track (L6043). Each was verified end-to-end:\n    • Focus session: POST /focus/session {25min, completed:true, locked=0} → xp_delta=+5; today.xp 0→5; by-area.mindset=5; task_log row _source='focus_session' xp_awarded=5.\n    • Late challenge: seeded auto_uncompleted=true row, POST /challenge/past/{id}/answer {completed:true,easy} → awarded_xp=30; today.xp=30; _source='challenge_late' row.\n    • Confidence: POST /confidence/complete {track:'social'} → ok=true xp_awarded=15; today.xp=15; _source='confidence_track' row xp_awarded=15.\n    • Goal step + goal complete: POST /goals (unit='days', target=1, focus_area='social', xp_reward=100) then POST /goals/{id}/progress {current_value:1} → both _source='goal_step' (30 XP) and _source='goal_complete' (30 XP, capped from 100) rows present; by-area.social=60.\n    • Gift NOT logged: admin gift 50 XP → today.xp unchanged, today.gifted_xp +=50, ZERO _source rows for that user. Profile total_xp +=50 (gift counts toward total but not chart-xp). Correct segregation.\n    • Regression: regular task complete writes a normal task_log row WITHOUT _source field (L1569-1578); chart correctly bumps; no double-counting.\n\n  ⚠️ Two **test-spec mismatches** (NOT backend bugs):\n    1. Spec scenario 1 said 'goal completion → total_xp 0→100'. Actual: non-admin with unit='days' has GOAL_XP_CAPS['days']=30, so xp_reward=100 is capped to 30 (server.py L1722, _clamp_goal_xp). Furthermore, completing a unit='days' goal in a single tick with target_value=1 ALSO awards step XP (30) BEFORE the completion bonus — so total_xp goes 0→60 (step 30 + complete 30). The chart correctly shows 60 with both _source rows. Backend behaviour is correct; spec assertion was naive.\n    2. Spec scenario 2 (3 ticks of a daily goal in one day) is impossible: backend (correctly) enforces a CYCLE LOCKOUT on unit='days' goals — server.py L1769-1781 returns 429 'cycle_locked' on the 2nd same-day tick. So only 1 step XP row (_source='goal_step', xp_awarded=30, focus_area='fitness') was confirmed in this run. The chart-logging machinery for goal_step is verified working; the '3 ticks in one day' scenario simply can't happen.\n\n  ⚠️ Aggregation scenario 8 fails BECAUSE OF the challenge_complete bug — today.xp summed from focus(5)+challenge(30)+step(30) was 35 instead of 65 because the 30 challenge XP didn't appear on the chart. Once the one-line fix lands, S8 will pass automatically.\n\n  ✅ Cleanup endpoints (S10): /profile, /stats/daily, /stats/weekly, /stats/monthly, /stats/by-area all 200 OK.\n\n  Marked task working:false, needs_retesting:false (waiting on main agent fix). Added to test_plan.current_focus."

POST /api/feedback {rating:5, text:'Love this app, please add dark theme', level_at_submit:3, platform:'ios'} → 200 with body={saved:true, id:'<uuid>'}.\n\n  ✅ [Step 2] Admin login (filip.cojocea122@gmail.com / XL98CZW5599) → 200; admin GET /admin/reports → 200 with reports[] and new_count.\n\n  ✅ [Step 3] Found A's feedback row. EXACT field matches: kind='feedback', severity='info', rating=5, stars='★★★★★' (5 filled, 0 empty), excerpt='Love this app, please add dark theme', reason starts with 'In-app feedback (5/5 stars)' (full string includes ' · Level 3'), level_at_submit=3, platform='ios', viewed_at=null, reported_email matches A's email.\n\n  ✅ [Step 4] new_count >= 1 and includes the new feedback row.\n\n  ✅ [Step 5] Edge cases — invalid POSTs do NOT create admin_reports rows: {rating:0}→400, {rating:6}→400, {text:'abc'}(missing rating)→400. After EACH failed POST, /admin/reports re-fetched and feedback rows for A stayed at the baseline 1.\n\n  ✅ [Step 6] Empty text: POST {rating:3, text:''} → 200; resulting admin_reports row has excerpt='(no comment)' and stars='★★★☆☆'.\n\n  ✅ [Step 7] GET /api/feedback/me as A → 200 with {submitted:true, submitted_at:'<iso>'}.\n\n  ✅ [Step 8] Multi-submission: 2nd POST {rating:4, text:'Second piece of feedback'} → 200; total feedback rows for A in /admin/reports = 3 (5★, 3★, 4★) — no dedupe.\n\n  ✅ [Step 9] Anonymous: header X-Anonymous-Id=<uuid>, no Bearer, {rating:2, text:'Anonymous user feedback'} → 200; admin sees a row with reported_email='', reported_name='Anonymous', rating=2.\n\n  ✅ [Step 10] Regression /admin/reports: non-admin GET → 403 'Admin only.'; POST /admin/reports/{id}/view by admin → 200 {ok:true} + viewed_at populated + new_count decremented exactly 1; POST /admin/reports/{id}/dismiss by admin → 200 {ok:true} + row removed from inbox.\n\n  ✅ [Step 11] Sanity smoke: /profile (JWT), /stats/weekly, /library/ratings — all 200.\n\n  Marked task 'Feedback → Admin notifications (POST /api/feedback creates admin_reports row)' working:true, needs_retesting:false. The admin-notify side-effect at server.py L6981-7008 fires correctly on every successful feedback POST and is correctly skipped on validation failures (HTTPException for invalid rating raises before the admin_reports insert). Stars formatter, '(no comment)' fallback, anonymous user_id derivation, and the ' · Level X' reason suffix all work per spec. Main agent can summarise & ship."

      message: "Library+ Mini-App Pricing & Purchases — 86/86 PASS via /app/library_pricing_test.py against https://xp-confidence.preview.emergentagent.com/api (run 2026-05-08). All 20 review-plan steps green:\n\n  ✅ S1 Anonymous (X-Anonymous-Id only) GET /library/pricing → 200 with pricing for all 4 apps {sleep, challenges, spot, confidence} and currencies array length=10 == [USD,EUR,GBP,AUD,CAD,JPY,INR,RON,CHF,BRL]. Default shape on a free app exactly: {price:0, currency:'USD', purchase_url:'', discount_percent:0, discount_active:false, effective_price:0, is_free:true, purchased:false}.\n\n  ✅ S2 Non-admin POST /library/pricing/sleep {price:9.99} → 403 with detail 'Creator only.'.\n\n  ✅ S3 Admin POST /library/pricing/sleep {price:9.99, currency:'USD', purchase_url:'https://ko-fi.com/example'} → 200; returned pricing has price=9.99, currency='USD', is_free=false, effective_price=9.99, purchase_url echoed, discount_active=false.\n\n  ✅ S4 Currency 'XYZ' → 400. ✅ S5 purchase_url 'ftp://bad' → 400. ✅ S6 price=-1 → 400. ✅ S7 invalid app_id 'foo' → 400. Sleep price stays 9.99 after rejected calls (no partial writes).\n\n  ✅ S8 Admin POST /pricing/sleep/discount {percent:50, duration_value:7, duration_unit:'days'} → 200 with discount_active=true, discount_percent=50, discount_starts_at + discount_ends_at non-null ISO timestamps, ends_at exactly 7.000 days ahead of now; effective_price=5.0 (within ±0.01 of theoretical 4.995 — backend rounds to 2dp via `round(max(0,eff),2)` at server.py L7224 so 9.99*0.5=4.995→5.0).\n\n  ✅ S9 Admin POST /discount {percent:0} → 200 clears: discount_active=false, effective_price=9.99 (full price restored).\n\n  ✅ S10 duration_value:0 → 400. ✅ S11 percent:120 → 400. ✅ S12 duration_unit:'years' → 400 (only days|weeks|months allowed). ✅ S13 Non-admin POST /discount → 403.\n\n  ✅ S14 Fresh user A registered (gmail.com): GET /library/pricing → A.sleep.purchased=false, A.sleep.is_free=false. POST /library/purchase/sleep → 200 {saved:true, already_owned:false, is_free:false}. Re-POST → {saved:true, already_owned:true, is_free:false} (idempotent). Subsequent GET → A.sleep.purchased=true.\n\n  ✅ S15 A POST /library/purchase/challenges (free, no doc) → 200 {saved:false, already_owned:true, is_free:true} — backend short-circuits free apps without inserting a library_purchases row (server.py L7368). Subsequent GET → challenges.purchased=false (no row inserted). ✅ S16 POST /library/purchase/foo → 400.\n\n  ✅ S17 Anonymous flow (X-Anonymous-Id only, no JWT): GET → 200 with sleep.purchased=false initially; POST /library/purchase/sleep → 200 saved:true; subsequent GET with same X-Anonymous-Id → sleep.purchased=true; different X-Anonymous-Id → sleep.purchased=false (correct device isolation).\n\n  ✅ S18 Admin POST /pricing/sleep {price:0} → 200 is_free=true; A's GET still shows sleep.purchased=true (library_purchases row persists across price changes) AND sleep.is_free=true.\n\n  ✅ S19 Regression — /library/ratings still works for both admin and a fresh user; both return ratings dict with all 4 apps.\n\n  ✅ S20 GET /library/pricing returns pricing for all 4 apps; sleep is_free=true (after S18 reset), challenges/spot/confidence is_free=true by default.\n\n  Edge cases verified: rounding (effective_price 4.995→5.0 within tolerance), idempotency (re-POST purchase returns already_owned=true), anonymous device isolation (different X-Anonymous-Id values see independent purchase state), persistence across pricing changes (purchased stays true even when admin sets price=0), ko-fi/Stripe trust-based purchase recording works for both JWT users and anon devices. No bugs found. Marked task 'Library+ pricing & purchases endpoints' working:true, needs_retesting:false. Main agent can summarise & ship."


    - agent: "testing"
      message: "Stripe Checkout integration — PARTIAL PASS, 37/41 assertions in /app/stripe_checkout_test.py against https://xp-confidence.preview.emergentagent.com/api (run 2026-05-08). 10 of 11 review-plan steps GREEN; 1 CRITICAL BACKEND BUG blocks step 6 (webhook).\n\n  ✅ S1 admin set sleep price 9.99/USD → 200. ✅ S2 user A POST /payments/create-checkout {app_id:'sleep'} → 200 with REAL Stripe call (backend log: stripe POST /v1/checkout/sessions response_code=200), session_id='cs_test_a1JahmZzpYzkhXw1eFlAPQzWb6hDOoJL2dk1zlUg7YfiuNoUyu4mv777by', checkout_url starts 'https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_…', amount=999, currency='USD', effective_price=9.99, app_id='sleep'. ✅ S3 invalid app_id 'foo' → 400 'Invalid app_id…'. ✅ S4 free app → 400 'This app is free — no checkout needed.'. ✅ S5 already-owns (after legacy /library/purchase) → 409 'You already own this mini-app.'. ✅ S7 Discount math: 50% off 9.99 → amount=500, effective_price=5.0 (within 499..500 / 4.99..5.00 tolerance band). ✅ S8 GET /payments/return?status=success → 200 HTML with content-type text/html; body contains 'xpconfidence://payments/return', 'cs_test_xyz', 'Payment received'. ✅ S9 ?status=cancel → 200 HTML containing 'cancelled'. ✅ S10 GET /payments/session/cs_test_does_not_exist_xyz/verify → 404 with detail 'Session not found: ... No such checkout.session: cs_test_does_not_exist_xyz' (real Stripe API hit, returned resource_missing). ✅ S11 Regression: /library/pricing, /library/ratings, /admin/reports — all 200.\n\n  ❌❌❌ [S6 — CRITICAL BUG] POST /api/payments/webhook returns **400 {detail: 'Invalid JSON'}** on perfectly valid JSON payloads. Verified end-to-end with curl from outside the test runner: `curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"type\":\"checkout.session.completed\",\"data\":{...}}' https://xp-confidence.preview.emergentagent.com/api/payments/webhook` → HTTP/2 400 `{\"detail\":\"Invalid JSON\"}`. Direct DB count via Motor confirmed library_purchases row was NOT inserted for the test user. /library/pricing as user B continues to show sleep.purchased=false. The user CANNOT be unlocked via the webhook path.\n\n  ROOT CAUSE: server.py L7559 has `event = json.loads(body.decode(\"utf-8\") or \"{}\")` BUT `json` is NOT imported at module scope. `grep -n '^import json\\|^from json' /app/backend/server.py` returns NOTHING — the only `import json` (L2123) is local to a different function. At request-time `json` raises NameError, which the broad `except Exception` catches and re-raises as `HTTPException(400, 'Invalid JSON')` — the error message is misleading; it's the missing import, not the JSON.\n\n  ONE-LINE FIX: add `import json` to the top of server.py (or inside the `stripe_webhook` handler before the json.loads call).\n\n  After the fix, re-run /app/stripe_checkout_test.py — webhook idempotency assertions (single library_purchases row even after duplicate POSTs) will pass. The fallback /payments/session/{id}/verify path DOES work (S10 confirmed Stripe was reached), so a paying user could still get unlocked via the frontend deep-link verify path even with the webhook broken — but server-side webhook is non-functional until import is added.\n\n  Marked task 'Stripe Checkout integration' working:false, stuck_count:1, needs_retesting:true."
